title: Patchbay — Modular Synth
description: A tiny modular synthesizer — wire oscillators, filters and envelopes with draggable patch cables and record a WAV.
concept: A patch-cable modular synth in the browser. Drag six module types (Oscillator, LFO, Noise, Filter, Envelope, Output) onto a patch canvas, then drag glowing cables between colored jacks to route audio and control signals — including audio-rate FM and filter-cutoff modulation. Three built-in presets demonstrate wobble bass, an ambient drone, and a bleepy sequence, and every tweak autosaves.
features: 6 modular synth building blocks (Osc, LFO, Noise, Filter, Envelope, Output) with real audio-rate patch cables
Drag-to-connect cabling with click-to-delete, plus CV modulation routing (LFO→filter cutoff, LFO→oscillator FM)
3 built-in presets (Wobble Bass, Drone Pad, Bleepy Sequence) plus Clear/rebuild from scratch
Record the live patch output and export as a downloadable WAV file
Save/Load named patches and Export/Import patch as JSON, with autosave to localStorage on every edit

interaction.mouse: Drag module headers to reposition; drag knobs vertically to change values
interaction.click: Click ⊕ toolbar buttons to add modules; click a cable to delete it; click TRIGGER to fire an envelope
interaction.touch: All dragging and jack-wiring works with touch via Pointer Events
interaction.keyboard: Space bar fires all envelope modules at once
